subject: Pension Fund Performance Review - Q1 2026
body:
Dear Trustees,

Q1 2026 performance summary for the defined benefit pension plan:

Plan Assets: $145.2M (up from $138.7M at year-end)
Plan Liabilities: $132.8M (discount rate: 4.85%)
Funded Status: 109.3% (overfunded by $12.4M)

Asset Allocation Performance:
- US Equities (35%): +4.2% (benchmark S&P 500: +3.8%)
- International Equities (20%): +2.1% (benchmark MSCI EAFE: +1.9%)
- Fixed Income (30%): +1.3% (benchmark Bloomberg Agg: +1.1%)
- Alternatives (10%): +3.5% (PE distributions boosted returns)
- Cash (5%): +1.2%

Total Return: +2.8% (weighted benchmark: +2.4%)
Excess return: +40bps

Actuarial Update:
- Mortality table update increased liabilities by $1.8M
- Offset by higher discount rate (4.85% vs 4.65% at year-end)
- No additional employer contribution required for 2026

Next review: June 30th. Investment committee meeting scheduled for April 15th.
